summary: Configure k3s/containerd to trust the HTTP registry endpoint on every k3s node.
command:
ssh <k3s-node> 'sudo install -d -m 0755 /etc/rancher/k3s && sudo tee /etc/rancher/k3s/registries.yaml >/dev/null <<"YAML"
mirrors:
  "swarm1.lab.auzietek.com:5001":
    endpoint:
      - "http://swarm1.lab.auzietek.com:5001"
YAML
sudo systemctl restart k3s || sudo systemctl restart k3s-agent'
